allow: Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'tail -15 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>&1; echo "=== env dir ==="; ls -ld /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp 2>&1')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'echo "=== rebuild log tail ==="; tail -20 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>&1; echo "=== env dir ==="; ls -ld /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'sed -n "/VERIFY/,$p" /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>&1; echo "=== env python ==="; ls -l /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp/bin/python3 2>&1; ls /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp/lib/python3*/encodings/__init__.py 2>&1')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'cat /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log; echo "=== envs dir contents ==="; ls -la /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/ 2>&1')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'tail -20 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log; echo "=== env python sanity ==="; /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp/bin/python3 -c "print\(1+1\)" 2>&1 | tail -2')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'tail -22 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log; echo "=== direct env python sanity ==="; /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp/bin/python3 -c "print\(\\"py-ok\\", 1+1\)" 2>&1 | tail -2')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'setsid bash /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/build_pmp.sh > /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo "launched detached pid=$!"; sleep 2; echo "--- early log ---"; head -5 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'for i in $\(seq 1 60\); do grep -q BUILD_DONE /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log 2>/dev/null && break; sleep 30; done; echo "=== final tail ==="; tail -20 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes nurion 'echo "=== log tail ==="; tail -15 /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/pmp_rebuild.log; echo "=== build proc alive? ==="; pgrep -af "build_pmp.sh|conda create|conda install" | grep -v pgrep | head; echo "=== env python present? ==="; ls -l /scratch/e1837a01/.conda/envs/pmp/bin/python3 2>&1')
